title: Assistant Editor
description:
About the Company
Mocean is a creative studio producing social campaigns for major studios and brands. The team pairs senior editors with assistant talent to deliver fast-turn, spec-accurate social creative.


About the Role
Mocean is hiring a freelance Assistant Editor to support its Social team on a fully remote contract. This entry-level role is built for someone early in their career who wants hands-on reps cutting social campaigns while supporting senior editors with media management, versioning, and delivery.


Responsibilities

  • Ingest, organize, transcode, and maintain project files
  • Cut versions, resizes, and platform variants from approved masters
  • Take on light editing assignments as skills grow
  • Prepare exports and deliveries across social platform specs (vertical, square, horizontal, captioned)
  • Support senior editors and the creative team through the full project lifecycle

Requirements

  • Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro
  • Working knowledge of social platform specs and aspect ratios (IG, TikTok, YouTube, X, Meta)
  • Strong organizational habits and attention to detail
  • Ability to juggle multiple projects and hit fast turnarounds
  • Clear, proactive communication in a fully remote environment
  • After Effects experience is a plus

Compensation
$20 – $23 per hour (freelance, fully remote).


Location
Remote.
skills: Adobe Premiere Pro,Social platform specs,Media management,After Effects,Remote collaboration

title: Motion and Video Designer
description:
About the Company
Varonis is a data security company helping organizations protect sensitive information. Its marketing team uses motion and video to explain complex security concepts across campaigns, social, web, and events.


About the Role
Varonis is hiring a Motion and Video Designer to elevate how the brand moves, animates, and tells stories across marketing channels. This hands-on remote role combines strong motion fundamentals with clean, compelling video editing for demos, ads, social, tradeshow, and testimonial content.


Responsibilities

  • Curate motion systems with attention to clarity, design, composition, and timing
  • Develop and evolve a comprehensive motion graphics package and guidelines
  • Edit customer stories, interviews, social content, webinars, and explainer videos
  • Design and animate motion assets from concept to completion across campaigns, social, video, and web
  • Simplify abstract concepts through thoughtful motion
  • Manage projects independently with minimal oversight

Requirements

  • 4–6 years of experience in motion design and video editing
  • Proven track record with a strong public-facing portfolio
  • Expert proficiency in Adobe After Effects, Premiere, Final Cut, Rive, and Figma
  • Very strong design eye and ability to work across motion styles
  • Passion for enterprise brand storytelling and experimentation

Location
Remote.
skills: Adobe After Effects,Adobe Premiere,Final Cut,Figma,Rive,Motion graphics

title: Digital Designer
description:
About the Company
IDR is a staffing and consulting firm connecting creative and technology talent with enterprise clients. This engagement supports a next-generation energy company focused on innovative solutions and brand storytelling.


About the Role
IDR is seeking a Digital Designer for a remote opportunity with a leading energy client. The role manages and creates engaging marketing materials across digital, print, and broadcast while owning creative from concept through launch.


Responsibilities

  • Manage multiple design projects simultaneously with timely delivery
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams on brand-aligned creative
  • Develop visual design strategies to enhance user experience across channels
  • Create pixel-perfect digital assets for print, web, social, and broadcast
  • Take creative ownership from concept through launch

Requirements

  • 5+ years of experience in an agency or in-house creative team
  • Proficiency developing digital assets including icons, layouts, typography, and animations
  • Experience with CMS platforms such as AEM, SDL Tridion, or WordPress
  • Excellent time-management skills in a deadline-driven environment
  • Familiarity with digital photo editing and multi-platform design

Location
Remote.

title: Photographer
description:
About the Company
Zillow Group operates leading real estate brands. Zillow Media Experts photographers capture listing media that helps agents market homes with photos, video, and interactive 3D floor plans.


About the Role
Zillow Media Experts is seeking experienced photographers for part-time real estate media work in Oregon. This remote-classified field role involves traveling between job sites in your market, capturing media on location, and uploading finished assets to spec.


Responsibilities

  • Capture high-quality photos, videos, and 3D interactive floor plans for listings
  • Drive between job sites within your assigned market area
  • Cull and upload media according to Zillow Media Experts specifications
  • Deliver professional listing media that helps agents market properties
  • Work part-time (typically 10–20 hours per week, with occasional higher demand)

Requirements

  • Experienced real estate or architectural photography background
  • Reliable transportation and ability to work field assignments in Oregon
  • Strong attention to detail for on-site capture and upload workflows
  • Comfort with part-time schedule and local market travel
  • Professional equipment suitable for real estate media production

Compensation
Hourly pay ranges by state; Oregon roles typically align with published Zillow Media Experts hourly bands (approximately $23–$38/hr depending on location).


Location
Remote.
skills: Real estate photography,Video capture,3D floor plans,Media upload,On-location production

title: Video Editor
description:
About the Company
Charlotte Party Rentals is a leading tent and event solutions company in the Carolinas, specializing in professionally installed setups for corporate and construction events since 2006.


About the Role
Charlotte Party Rentals is seeking a skilled Video Editor for a full-time remote role. You will edit video materials, create motion graphics, color grade footage, and collaborate with marketing to produce compelling brand content.


Responsibilities

  • Edit video materials and assist in production of high-quality visuals
  • Create motion graphics and color grade footage
  • Collaborate with marketing and creative teams on brand-aligned content
  • Develop engaging visuals that reflect company values
  • Meet deadlines efficiently in a remote workflow

Requirements

  • Proficiency in video editing and video production
  • Experience in video color grading and motion graphics
  • Familiarity with graphics tools and visual storytelling
  • Knowledge of Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or similar
  • Ability to work independently remotely; marketing/event video experience is a plus

Location
Remote.
skills: Adobe Premiere Pro,Final Cut Pro,Motion graphics,Color grading,Marketing video

title: Video Editor
description:
About the Company
Kika Marketing & Communications is a creative and communications agency delivering marketing content and video production for brand clients.


About the Role
Kika Marketing & Communications is hiring a Video Editor for a remote role based in India. The position focuses on editing and finishing marketing video content to brand and client standards.


Responsibilities

  • Edit marketing and communications video content for client deliverables
  • Collaborate with creative and account teams on revisions and approvals
  • Maintain organized project files and delivery formats
  • Support fast-turn social and campaign video needs
  • Ensure final exports meet platform and brand specifications

Requirements

  • Strong video editing experience with a demonstrable portfolio
  • Proficiency with professional editing tools (e.g., Premiere Pro or similar)
  • Attention to detail and clear remote communication
  • Ability to manage deadlines across multiple projects
  • Eligible to work remotely from India

Location
Remote.

title: Illustrator
description:
About the Company
Gecko Programmes Ltd delivers training and creative programme services, combining customer-facing support with creative production needs.


About the Role
Gecko Programmes is hiring an Illustrator and Customer Service Associate for a remote role. The position blends illustration deliverables with customer support responsibilities in a distributed team environment.


Responsibilities

  • Create illustration assets aligned with programme and client needs
  • Provide customer service support alongside creative deliverables
  • Collaborate remotely with programme coordinators and stakeholders
  • Maintain quality standards for visual outputs and communications
  • Manage tasks and deadlines in a remote workflow

Requirements

  • Demonstrated illustration skills with a relevant portfolio
  • Strong written communication for customer-facing work
  • Comfort working remotely with cross-functional teams
  • Organized, dependable, and detail-oriented
  • Experience with digital illustration tools

Location
Remote.

title: 3D Artist
description:
About the Company
vyom is hiring creative talent for remote 3D production work supporting visual and digital deliverables.


About the Role
vyom is seeking a 3D Artist for a remote role. The artist will produce 3D assets and visuals for creative projects, collaborating asynchronously with the production team.


Responsibilities

  • Create 3D models, textures, and renders for assigned projects
  • Iterate on creative direction and feedback remotely
  • Prepare assets for downstream animation or compositing when needed
  • Maintain organized project files and naming conventions
  • Meet project milestones in a remote production environment

Requirements

  • Portfolio demonstrating strong 3D modeling and rendering
  • Proficiency with industry-standard 3D tools
  • Ability to take creative direction and work independently
  • Clear communication in a remote team
  • Attention to detail on asset quality and delivery specs

Location
Remote.

title: Illustrator
description:
About the Company
Ludere Studios is a creative studio focused on illustration asset production for games and digital products.


About the Role
Ludere Studios is opening a full-time remote Illustrator opportunity for artists to join the team producing illustration assets. Applications are accepted via the studio application link.


Responsibilities

  • Create illustration assets for studio projects
  • Collaborate with art direction on style and deliverable specs
  • Iterate on feedback and maintain consistent quality
  • Meet production schedules in a remote team environment
  • Support asset pipelines for game or digital product needs

Requirements

  • Strong illustration portfolio relevant to production work
  • Ability to work full-time remotely
  • Clear communication and reliable delivery habits
  • Comfort collaborating with a distributed creative team
  • Apply through the official Ludere Studios application link

Location
Remote.

title: Digital Designer
description:
About the Company
Edition Studios creates high-end marketing and digital experiences for luxury real estate, hospitality, fashion, aviation, healthcare, and lifestyle brands.


About the Role
Edition Studios is seeking a Digital Designer (remote) to execute premium marketing assets across social, email, web, and advertising, with opportunities to collaborate on larger website and brand identity work.


Responsibilities

  • Design social media content and campaign creative
  • Create email marketing campaigns and templates
  • Design landing pages and website content updates
  • Develop digital advertising creative across channels
  • Collaborate with strategists, account managers, and developers
  • Support website design through page design, UI components, and content modules

Requirements

  • 3+ years of professional design experience
  • Strong portfolio featuring digital marketing, social, email, and web work
  • Proficiency in Figma and Adobe Creative Suite
  • Strong typography, layout, and visual storytelling skills
  • Excellent communication and ability to manage multiple deadlines

Location
Remote.
skills: Figma,Adobe Creative Suite,Social media design,Email design,Web design

title: Illustrator
description:
About the Company
Calla Press is recruiting illustrators for picture book and illustrated publishing projects through an open portfolio submission call.


About the Role
Calla Press invited illustrators to submit portfolios for consideration. Note: submissions were temporarily closed while the first review round is processed; follow the post for updates on future openings.


Responsibilities

  • Submit portfolio materials for picture book illustration consideration
  • Present storytelling-driven illustration work suitable for publishing
  • Follow submission instructions shared on the official Instagram post
  • Maintain portfolio quality across character, pacing, and emotional expression
  • Monitor the post for reopening or future submission rounds

Requirements

  • Strong picture book or narrative illustration portfolio
  • Ability to communicate story and emotion through visuals
  • Professional presentation of portfolio links or PDFs
  • Follow publisher submission guidance when applications reopen
  • Passion for children’s publishing and illustrated books

Location
Remote.

title: Illustrator
description:
About the Company
The Visual Arts Center of Richmond (VisArts) has been a staple in the Richmond community since 1963. The center hosts programs, exhibitions, and special events, and is known for offering more than 1,600 adult and youth art classes annually.


About the Role
VisArts is accepting applications for its Featured Illustrator Program. Each summer, four artists are selected to create custom illustrations for seasonal class catalogs and an additional special project, celebrating and supporting illustrators in the community.


Responsibilities

  • Produce one cover illustration and five spot illustrations for an assigned VisArts class catalog
  • Create illustrations that reflect one or more of VisArts creative mediums (clay, design, digital arts, drawing and painting, fiber, glass, and more)
  • Complete one additional illustration project such as an exhibition piece, summer camp catalog cover, holiday mini catalog cover, or event poster
  • Lead a workshop on a topic of your choice if invited as part of the program
  • Collaborate with the VisArts marketing and communications team on creative direction and deadlines

Requirements

  • Strong illustration portfolio suitable for editorial and catalog work
  • Applicants must be 18 years of age or older and currently based in the United States
  • Apply through the official VisArts Featured Illustrator application by the posted deadline
  • Ability to deliver finished illustrations on schedule for print production
  • Review full program details at visarts.org/illustrator before applying

Compensation
$1,500 honorarium per selected illustrator, plus standard instructor fees for an associated workshop.


Location
Remote.

title: Senior Visual Designer
description:
About the Company
Red Ventures builds portfolio brands including Bankrate, The Points Guy, and more. Bankrate helps consumers make smarter financial decisions through content and marketing.


About the Role
Red Ventures is hiring a Senior Visual Designer for Bankrate to own visual execution across paid social, display, email, landing pages, and direct mail. The role is open to remote or hybrid candidates (East Coast preference) with a performance-marketing focus.


Responsibilities

  • Produce assets for paid social and display with modular iteration systems
  • Translate testing hypotheses into creative variants across placements
  • Design email templates and campaign assets supporting lifecycle programs
  • Build modular email design systems for scalable deployment
  • Own direct mail creative within print specs and production timelines
  • Steward Bankrate visual identity and organized design files

Requirements

  • Performance design track record across social, display, email, and landing pages
  • Multi-channel fluency and systems thinking for modular templates
  • Creative problem-solving within tight CTA, format, and disclosure constraints
  • Expert in Figma; proficient in Adobe Creative Suite
  • Collaborative, fast-moving workflow with marketing stakeholders

Compensation
$100,000 – $150,000 total cash compensation per year (range varies by level and location).


Location
Remote.

title: Product Designer
description:
About the Company
Whatnot is a livestream shopping marketplace for collectibles, fashion, electronics, and more across North America and Europe.


About the Role
Whatnot is hiring a Product Designer to solve complex problems, design scalable systems, and build thoughtful user-centric experiences across buyer and seller workflows. Remote U.S. work is available alongside hub cities.


Responsibilities

  • Design end-to-end product experiences across user-facing and internal tools
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams on complex workflows
  • Create wireframes, prototypes, and final visuals
  • Translate research insights into compelling design solutions
  • Contribute to the design system and inclusive UX standards
  • Use data and feedback to iterate on features

Requirements

  • 5+ years of product design experience with shipped work
  • Strong interaction and systems thinking
  • Expertise in Figma and prototyping tools
  • Deep UX methodology including research and usability testing
  • Excellent cross-functional communication

Compensation
$153,000 – $235,000 annually (offers equity).


Location
Remote.

title: Distinguished Designer
description:
About the Company
Ladders connects professionals with high-paying roles and partners with leading employers. This search supports a consumer technology client hiring senior design leadership.


About the Role
Ladders is recruiting a Distinguished Designer for a consumer technology client. The role advances UX strategy for a major platform, including AI-powered experiences, workflow redesign, and mentorship of senior design talent. Remote U.S. only; no visa sponsorship.


Responsibilities

  • Lead long-term UX strategy for the company platform
  • Envision AI-powered user experiences and human-in-the-loop interaction points
  • Redesign workflows for simpler, more intuitive interactions
  • Lead discovery on complex cross-functional system challenges
  • Establish reusable patterns and scalable information architecture
  • Collaborate with product and engineering leadership; mentor senior designers

Requirements

  • 12+ years in product design/UX (or equivalent education-adjusted experience)
  • Experience influencing product strategy and technical decisions
  • Background establishing UX practices for emerging technologies
  • Degree in design, HCI, or equivalent experience
  • Up to 25% travel; reliable high-speed internet for remote work

Compensation
$203,000 – $325,000 annually.


Location
Remote.
skills: UX strategy,Product design,Information architecture,AI-powered UX,Design leadership

title: Service Designer
description:
About the Company
MO engineers human-centered digital solutions for government agencies, blending product, design, data, and modern software practices to modernize legacy systems and deliver mission-ready products.


About the Role
MO is hiring a remote Service Designer to support the U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs. You will map complex systems and processes, produce service blueprints and journey maps, and collaborate with product, data, and engineering partners.


Responsibilities

  • Document VA stakeholder experiences and translate findings into service artifacts
  • Use mixed-method discovery across systems, processes, and people
  • Lead co-design of low- and high-fidelity service design outputs
  • Collaborate with product managers, data scientists, and engineers
  • Build stakeholder relationships and facilitate sensemaking sessions
  • Problem-solve with government ecosystem peers on delivery outcomes

Requirements

  • 3+ years in research, UX, or service design on complex multi-stakeholder projects
  • Excellent organizational skills for high-profile initiatives
  • Passion for design research in ambiguous problem spaces
  • Experience with agile cross-functional teams
  • Ability to visualize complex ideas clearly; U.S. citizenship required for contract

Compensation
$100,000 – $113,500 annually plus benefits.


Location
Remote.

title: Academic Designer
description:
About the Company
McGraw Hill is a global learning company providing educational content, platforms, and services across K–12, higher education, and professional markets.


About the Role
McGraw Hill is hiring an Academic Designer to support the development of engaging learning materials and academic content experiences. This remote-friendly role focuses on design quality for education products used by students and instructors.


Responsibilities

  • Design and develop academic learning materials and visual content
  • Collaborate with editorial, product, and learning science teams
  • Ensure content meets pedagogical goals and brand standards
  • Iterate on layouts, graphics, and learning interactions
  • Support production schedules for courseware and learning products

Requirements

  • Experience in academic, instructional, or educational design
  • Strong visual design skills with attention to clarity and accessibility
  • Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines
  • Excellent communication in cross-functional teams
  • Proficiency with design tools used in educational publishing workflows

Location
Remote.
skills: Instructional design,Visual design,Learning products,Content development,Adobe Creative Suite

title: Product Designer
description:
About the Company
Flex makes it easy for health and wellness brands to accept HSA and FSA payments online, with real-time eligibility verification and checkout flows for mixed carts.


About the Role
Flex is hiring a Product Designer to own end-to-end design for the merchant experience, partnering with engineering to ship intuitive product at startup speed. The role starts on the merchant team and grows into broader product ownership.


Responsibilities

  • Own product design end-to-end on the merchant team from research through UI
  • Run merchant interviews and synthesize insights into product direction
  • Partner with engineering and founders on roadmap, scope, and delivery
  • Design user flows in Figma and supporting visual UI
  • Use modern AI tools to prototype and iterate faster
  • Collaborate on evolving the Flex design system

Requirements

  • 3+ years of product design experience, ideally at a high-growth startup
  • User-first approach with strength in flows between research and visual design
  • Expert in Figma and strong cross-functional collaboration
  • Comfort being user-facing with merchants and sales stakeholders
  • Actively uses AI in design workflow; low ego and strong ownership

Compensation
$120,000 – $190,000 annually (offers equity).


Location
Remote.
